//: Mutation testing for the exlib simulation core. Run from this folder: `dotnet stryker`.
//gate: Use --break-at <pct> in CI to fail below a mutation-score floor once it is raised.
//limitation: Only exlib is mutated here. ppex/smex use Roslyn source generators (ExpandedLib.Generators), which Stryker's in-memory recompilation cannot reproduce ('Internal error due to compile error'). Mutation-test those by temporarily disabling the generator ProjectReference, or keep their guarantees on the integration/property tests.
